summary: Enthusiastic personal recollection with no specific comments on sound quality or musical performance
review: The lone review is an enthusiastic, memory‑laden account of attending the show in Pittsburgh after a road trip and some acid, awarding it five stars purely for nostalgia. It provides no information about the recording source, audio fidelity, setlist, or any standout performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive but non‑technical review; insufficient data to assess musical or recording quality accurately.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No details about the setlist or performance flow were mentioned.
